tools.name: app_open
tools.description: Open local applications or websites based on user intent

tools.name: app_close
tools.description: Kill running processes

tools.name: app_restart
tools.description: Restart apps safely

tools.name: system_info
tools.description: Get CPU, RAM, Disk usage

tools.name: battery_status
tools.description: Power monitoring and battery info

tools.name: network_status
tools.description: Internet connectivity and IP info

tools.name: clipboard_read
tools.description: Read clipboard content

tools.name: clipboard_write
tools.description: Write to clipboard

tools.name: notification_push
tools.description: Send native OS notifications

tools.name: screenshot_capture
tools.description: Capture screen or window

tools.name: app_minimize
tools.description: Minimize application window

tools.name: app_maximize
tools.description: Maximize application window

tools.name: app_focus
tools.description: Bring application to front and focus

tools.name: brightness_status
tools.description: Get current screen brightness level

tools.name: brightness_increase
tools.description: Increase screen brightness by specified amount (default +1)

tools.name: brightness_decrease
tools.description: Decrease screen brightness by specified amount (default -1)

tools.name: sound_status
tools.description: Get current system volume level and mute status

tools.name: sound_increase
tools.description: Increase system volume by specified amount (default +30)

tools.name: sound_decrease
tools.description: Decrease system volume by specified amount (default -30)

tools.name: mic_mute
tools.description: Mute the microphone on the connected desktop client

tools.name: mic_unmute
tools.description: Unmute the microphone on the connected desktop client

tools.name: current_location
tools.description: Get current location via IP geolocation

tools.name: lock_screen
tools.description: Lock the OS screen immediately

tools.name: shell_agent
tools.description: Run guarded PowerShell or shell steps with LLM guidance until the task is finished
example_triggers: inspect the tools folder and summarize what is there

tools.name: file_search
tools.description: Locate files and folders

tools.name: file_open
tools.description: Open files with default or specified app

tools.name: file_create
tools.description: Create new files with content

tools.name: file_delete
tools.description: Safely delete files

tools.name: file_move
tools.description: Move files to new location

tools.name: file_copy
tools.description: Copy files

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read content from a file

tools.name: folder_create
tools.description: Create new directories

tools.name: folder_cleanup
tools.description: Organize and clean folders

tools.name: folder_organize
tools.description: Organize folder structure

tools.name: web_research
tools.description: Performs deep web research by searching, scraping top results, and summarizing the findings.

tools.name: agent_status
tools.description: Get current status of the agent

tools.name: ai_summarize
tools.description: Summarize AI-related content like logs, conversations, or documents

tools.name: tool_catalog
tools.description: Inspect the canonical tool catalog, schemas, and examples

tools.name: message_send
tools.description: Send a text message to a contact

tools.name: message_file
tools.description: Send a document or file (PDF, ZIP, DOCX, etc.) to a contact

tools.name: message_media
tools.description: Send a photo or video to a contact

tools.name: call_audio
tools.description: Start an audio call with a contact

tools.name: call_video
tools.description: Start a video call with a contact

tools.name: music_play
tools.description: Play music immediately — streams YouTube/SoundCloud via mpv+yt-dlp with no browser, or plays a local audio file. Audio starts in the background automatically.

tools.name: music_stop
tools.description: Stop one or all active music sessions launched by music_play.

tools.name: music_status
tools.description: Two-layer audio status: (1) our tracked sessions with full metadata, (2) OS-level scan of every process emitting audio via pactl / CoreAudio / WASAPI.

tools.name: music_pause
tools.description: Pause an active playback session by suspending the player process. Audio stops immediately; position is preserved. Resume with music_resume.

tools.name: music_resume
tools.description: Resume a paused playback session. Accumulated pause time is tracked so progress remains accurate.

tools.name: email_list
tools.description: List emails from the mailbox with optional label and query filters

tools.name: email_read
tools.description: Fetch the full content (headers, body, attachments) of a single email by ID

tools.name: email_send
tools.description: Compose and send a new email

tools.name: email_reply
tools.description: Reply to an existing email within the same thread

tools.name: email_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete an email — IRREVERSIBLE. Use email_trash for a safer alternative

tools.name: email_trash
tools.description: Move an email to Trash (recoverable within 30 days)

tools.name: email_mark_read
tools.description: Mark one or more emails as read

tools.name: email_mark_unread
tools.description: Mark one or more emails as unread

tools.name: email_search
tools.description: Search emails using full Gmail search syntax

tools.name: email_label
tools.description: Add or remove labels on a single email (supports system labels like STARRED, IMPORTANT and custom ones)

tools.name: email_move
tools.description: Move an email to a different label/folder by adding the destination label and removing source labels

tools.name: email_organize
tools.description: Bulk-organize emails matching a search query. Actions: mark_read | mark_unread | archive | trash | label:<name> | unlabel:<name>

tools.name: email_labels_list
tools.description: List all Gmail labels (system + user-created) with unread counts

tools.name: weather_current
tools.description: Get current weather conditions at user location

tools.name: weather_forecast
tools.description: Get a multi-day weather forecast at user location

tools.name: artifact_list
tools.description: List saved artifacts such as screenshots

tools.name: artifact_open
tools.description: Open a saved artifact such as the latest screenshot
